Name: MAP_OBJECT_WEIGHT_PARAM
Description: Defines how object weight affects physical simulation, including movement speed reduction on impact and gravity scaling behavior.

Fields.Name: Collision Speed Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to object speed when it collides or experiences impact forces.

Fields.Name: Gravity Acceleration Multiplier
Fields.Description: Scales the effect of gravity on the object, affecting how strongly it falls.
